config.name: google_workspace_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: google_workspace_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:19:17.954223

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)T(%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)%.?(%d*)"
local email_pattern = "^[%w%.%%%+%-]+@[%w%.%-]+%.%w+$"
local ipv4_pattern = "^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$"

-- Cached string operations
local format = string.format
local match = string.match
local time = os.time

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local vars
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication",
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Google Workspace",
                vendor_name = "Google"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        },
        time = nil,
        user = {},
        src_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp transformation
    if record.timestamp then
        local y,m,d,h,min,s = match(record.timestamp, timestamp_pattern)
        if y then
            output.time = os.time({year=y, month=m, day=d, hour=h, min=min, sec=s}) * 1000
        end
    end

    -- Email transformation with validation
    if record.user_email then
        if match(record.user_email, email_pattern) then
            output.user.email = record.user_email
        end
    end

    -- IP address transformation with validation
    if record.src_ip then
        local a,b,c,d = match(record.src_ip, ipv4_pattern)
        if a and b and c and d then
            if tonumber(a) < 256 and tonumber(b) < 256 and 
               tonumber(c) < 256 and tonumber(d) < 256 then
                output.src_endpoint.ip = record.src_ip
            end
        end
    end

    -- Event type mapping
    if record.event_type then
        output.activity_name = record.event_type
        output.activity_id = 1 -- Default activity ID
    end

    -- Action mapping
    if record.action then
        output.status = record.action
    end

    -- Application context
    if record.app_name then
        output.application = {
            name = record.app_name
        }
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.time then
        output.time = time() * 1000
    end

    -- Required field validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local status, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if status then
        return result
    else
        return nil, format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
end
